name: Barmaid / Barman
description: Works the floor, clears the tables, and hears every conversation in the room. Invisible to those who don't look, invaluable to those who do.
dialogue_hooks: asking what you'll have while sizing you up
warning you about a patron who's been watching you
sharing gossip in exchange for a good tip
asking for help with a problem the innkeeper won't address
mentioning that someone was asking about you earlier
voice_patterns: cheerful and efficient — talks while working

schedule.morning: sleeping in or cleaning up from last night
schedule.afternoon: setting up, light prep, early customers
